round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Synthesized cross-agent evidence to reinforce the linguistic finding.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Used linguistic and botanical evidence to downgrade alternative candidates (Laos/Cambodia).
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Used linguistic and meta evidence to confirm the regional specificity of the plants.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Used linguistic evidence to definitively rule out Cambodia and Laos.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure and linguistic cues to confirm the location.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the Thai script as the primary evidence, supported by consistent secondary evidence from all other agents (landscape, botany, regulatory, meta). The synthesis explicitly eliminated alternative candidates based on the weight of this evidence.
